title: The 13th Juror
writer: Henry Irving Dodge, Charles Logue, Walter Anthony
actors: Anna Q. Nilsson, Francis X. Bushman, Walter Pidgeon
plot: Richard Marsden is a long-time friend of Henry Desmond, a powerful and successful attorney. The district attorney plan to break Desmond by having George Quinn infer that Marsden's wife is having an affair with the lawyer.
